findings.description: Source contains a note clarifying that `doRW11AC0201` is the initial display handler for the user registration screen, which explains why `@OnError` forwards to `RW11AC0201` on validation failure. This context is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: note: `doRW11AC0201メソッドは、ユーザ情報登録画面を初期表示する処理。`

findings.description: PascalCase class names `SystemAccountEntity`, `CM311AC1Component`, and `MessageLevel` all appear in the code example for s5 but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: `SystemAccountEntity systemAccount = form.getSystemAccount();`, `CM311AC1Component component = new CM311AC1Component();`, `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)` in the validate private method code block
